text: I'm a software engineer focused on building enterprise-grade applications, clean user interfaces and performance-driven backend systems. I specialize in full stack development with expertise in React, Node.js and modern web technologies.

Currently, I'm developing cloud-native solutions as a MERN Intern at codevocado. I also lead the development of the Grampanchayat Dholewadi platform (https://dholewadi.in) as my final year project, digitizing rural administration using React and Supabase.
I'm passionate about writing clean, maintainable code that delivers measurable impact. Currently completing my Computer Science degree at Tatyasaheb Kore Institute of Engineering and Technology.
